task: Explain where the GitHub issue most likely starts and produce a bounded investigation path.

issue.title: Repository analysis crashes during build
issue.body: Traceback: File "api/services.py", line 6, in _build_and_store_analysis. parse_repo() raises a parser timeout error.

comments.body: The failing call path goes through parser/services.py::parse_repo.

tools.name: rank_issue_candidates
tools.description: Return deterministic candidate nodes from the stored artifact and issue evidence.

tools.name: load_focus_graph
tools.description: Return the bounded focus graph for candidate node IDs.

tools.name: load_code_context
tools.description: Return bounded code excerpts for selected candidate paths.
